examples.title: Data Encapsulation Process
examples.description: Demonstrates how data is wrapped with headers at each layer
examples.code:
PROCEDURE SendData
  Application: Add HTTP header
  Transport: Add TCP header → Segment
  Network: Add IP header → Packet
  Data Link: Add frame header/trailer → Frame
  Physical: Convert to bits
END
examples.explanation: Shows layer-specific encapsulation as data moves down OSI stack
